bottlenecks.where: AirlockGate per-action check on filesystem reads
bottlenecks.why: every Read tool call from a quarantined skill incurs a policy lookup
bottlenecks.mitigation: cache compiled policy in memory at session start; lookup is O(1)

bottlenecks.why: high-action skills could write the ledger thousands of times per run
bottlenecks.mitigation: buffer ledger appends in memory and flush once at run end

ambiguity_risks.fix: explicit list only in MVP; wildcards deferred

ambiguity_risks.ambiguity: consecutive clean runs versus total clean runs
is the shadow read by future runs of the same skill
ambiguity_risks.fix: shadow is per-run and discarded at run end; documented in PolicyManifest contract

token_explosions.surface: ObservationLedger printed to operator on /airlock status
token_explosions.trigger: skill with a long ledger requested verbosely
token_explosions.cap: /airlock status truncates to last 50 entries; full ledger is git-readable

token_explosions.surface: Propagation chain dumped on cross-skill invocation
token_explosions.cap: chain truncated at 8 hops; deeper chains recorded as truncated_chain entry

orchestration_drift.drift_mode: interception bypass when a skill imports its own fs module
orchestration_drift.guardrail: policy.yaml requires sdk-only file access; non-sdk reads fail loudly
/airlock promote requires --reason flag captured in promotion-log.md

governance_gaps.gap: skill installed manually with cp may skip the scaffold step
governance_gaps.owner: AirlockGate session-start check raises policy-missing on encountered orphan skill

governance_gaps.gap: operator could git rebase to rewrite history
governance_gaps.owner: promotion-log.md records ledger sha at promotion; mismatch triggers warning

sync_problems.surface: concurrent runs of two quarantined skills
sync_problems.resolution: single-process AccentOS guarantees serial run; documented invariant

sync_problems.race: operator promotes while skill is mid-execution
sync_problems.resolution: promotion takes effect on next run; current run finishes under quarantine policy

scalability_cliffs.next_step: extend AirlockGate with new interceptor; one surface per release

maintainability.decay_mode: fields added without migration break older skills
maintainability.preventer: schema-version field in policy.yaml; AirlockGate emits warning on mismatch

maintainability.decay_mode: AccentOS skill SDK changes Read/Write signatures
maintainability.preventer: AirlockGate is versioned alongside skill SDK; integration test pins both
